patterns_discovered.description: Multi-layered documentation approach: overview → prerequisites → setup → usage → API reference → testing → troubleshooting
patterns_discovered.significance: Enables users to progress from zero knowledge to advanced usage

patterns_discovered.description: All code samples include realistic SKU names, addresses, and order IDs that demonstrate actual use cases
patterns_discovered.significance: Reduces copy-paste errors and helps users understand expected data formats

patterns_discovered.description: Credentials managed through .env files with clear documentation of each variable's purpose and source
patterns_discovered.significance: Security-focused approach prevents accidental credential exposure

patterns_discovered.description: Each potential error includes cause analysis and debugging steps
patterns_discovered.significance: Reduces support burden by enabling self-service troubleshooting

patterns_discovered.description: Examples progress from basic initialization to advanced features like pagination and filtering
patterns_discovered.significance: Accommodates both beginners and advanced users

gotchas_discovered.detail: Documentation emphasizes refresh tokens don't expire but can be revoked, and that access tokens expire after 1 hour requiring automatic refresh
gotchas_discovered.impact: Users must implement proper token refresh logic or face authentication failures

gotchas_discovered.detail: Documentation includes a table showing specific marketplace IDs must match their respective regions (US, UK, etc.)
gotchas_discovered.impact: Mismatched region/marketplace ID causes order creation failures

gotchas_discovered.detail: Documentation requires FBA inventory to be MCF-eligible, not just present
gotchas_discovered.impact: Users may have inventory that fails fulfillment if not explicitly configured for MCF

gotchas_discovered.detail: Documentation mentions address validation can fail and lists specific required fields
gotchas_discovered.impact: Invalid address format causes order creation failures requiring debugging

gotchas_discovered.detail: Documentation mentions Amazon enforces per-endpoint rate limits requiring exponential backoff implementation
gotchas_discovered.impact: High-volume operations can fail without proper retry logic

approach_outcome.objective: Create comprehensive MCF integration README with setup instructions
approach_outcome.implementation_strategy: Created a 502-line markdown documentation file covering all aspects of Amazon SP-API MCF integration from initial setup through advanced usage and troubleshooting
key_achievements: Complete prerequisites section with step-by-step Seller Central navigation
Full environment configuration guide with all required variables documented
Multiple practical code examples covering basic to advanced scenarios
Comprehensive API reference for all MCFClient methods
Data model documentation with field specifications
Security best practices section addressing token management and rate limits
Detailed troubleshooting guide with common errors and solutions
Testing instructions for both unit and integration tests
approach_outcome.coverage: Addresses setup, usage, testing, security, and troubleshooting - complete documentation lifecycle

recommendations.recommendation: Create accompanying video walkthrough for SP-API credential generation workflow, as the OAuth flow in prerequisite section is complex
recommendations.rationale: Text-only OAuth instructions are error-prone; visual guide would reduce support requests

recommendations.recommendation: Add rate limiting implementation example to Usage section, as API rate limits are mentioned but no code solution provided
recommendations.rationale: Documentation mentions rate limits but doesn't show how to implement backoff strategy

recommendations.recommendation: Add links to example scripts referenced in documentation (test_mcf_integration.py) to verify they exist and match documented behavior
recommendations.rationale: Ensures documentation accuracy and prevents broken references

recommendations.recommendation: Document expected test output format and common test failures, as test section mentions dry-run mode but doesn't detail expected results
recommendations.rationale: Helps users validate their setup correctly and interpret test output

recommendations.recommendation: Add cost estimation section explaining MCF fees and how to calculate fulfillment costs for different order scenarios
recommendations.rationale: Users need financial planning information for MCF integration ROI analysis
